visuals.title: RPC Architecture Flow
visuals.description: Visual diagram for RPC Architecture Flow
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Resource Sharing in Distributed Systems</text>
  
  <!-- Central Resource -->
  <rect x="160" y="100" width="100" height="60" fill="#1565C0" rx="8" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="135" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Shared Resource
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Node 1 -->
  <circle cx="80" cy="70" r="25" fill="#2196F3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="80" y="73" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Node 1
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Node 2 -->
  <circle cx="340" cy="70" r="25" fill="#2196F3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="340" y="73" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Node 2
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Node 3 -->
  <circle cx="80" cy="190" r="25" fill="#2196F3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="80" y="193" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Node 3
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Node 4 -->
  <circle cx="340" cy="190" r="25" fill="#2196F3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="340" y="193" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Node 4
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Connection arrows -->
  <line x1="105" y1="70" x2="160" y2="115" stroke="#64B5F6" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="315" y1="70" x2="260" y2="115" stroke="#64B5F6" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="105" y1="190" x2="160" y2="145" stroke="#64B5F6" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="315" y1="190" x2="260" y2="145" stroke="#64B5F6" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  
  <!-- Arrowheads -->
  <polygon points="160,115 155,110 155,120" fill="#64B5F6" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </polygon>
  <polygon points="260,115 265,110 265,120" fill="#64B5F6" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </polygon>
  <polygon points="160,145 155,140 155,150" fill="#64B5F6" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </polygon>
  <polygon points="260,145 265,140 265,150" fill="#64B5F6" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </polygon>
</svg>
